mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activities (id, trip_id, day_number, place_id, custom_place_id, name, address, lat, lng, start_time, end_time, estimated_cost, cost_currency, category, transport_mode, rating, photo_url, notes, status, added_by, is_accommodation, is_starting_point, starting_point_date, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{dayNumber}, #{placeId}, #{customPlaceId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{name}, #{address}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{startTime,javaType=java.time.LocalTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{endTime,javaType=java.time.LocalTime,jdbcType=TIME}, #{estimatedCost}, #{costCurrency}, #{category}, #{transportMode}, #{rating}, #{photoUrl}, #{notes}, #{status}, #{addedBy,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{isAccommodation}, #{isStartingPoint}, #{startingPointDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activities WHERE trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY day_number, start_time
mapper.update: UPDATE activities SET sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
